name: ds4cc
description: Read-only guidance for discovering reviewed DS4CC plugins and installing them with Grok Build, Codex, Claude Code, or Copilot after source review.

interface.shortDescription: Browse and install DS4CC marketplace plugins across Grok, Codex, Claude, Copilot
interface.longDescription: Meta-plugin documenting how to register the DS4CC marketplace and install plugins on Grok Build (paste-friendly), Codex CLI, Claude Code, and GitHub Copilot CLI. Does not auto-install.
defaultPrompt: Show me how to add the DS4CC marketplace to Codex.
List the reviewed DS4CC plugins and their capabilities.
Show the Codex command for a DS4CC plugin without running it.
